name: Twice-Baked Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub the baking potatoes with a brush and prick them several times with a fork.
2. Place the potatoes in a shallow baking dish.
3. Micro-cook, uncovered, on 100% power for 6 to 8 minutes, or until tender.
4. Cut a lengthwise slice from the top of each potato. Discard the skin.
5. Place the potato portions from the top slices in a mixing bowl.
6. Scoop out the insides of the potatoes, leaving two 1/4-inch thick shells; reserve the shells.
7. Add the potato insides to the bowl containing the potato portions.
8. Mash the mixture and stir in the shredded cheddar cheese, butter or margarine, and sliced green onion.
9. Beat in enough milk until the mixture is stiff. Season with salt and freshly ground pepper.
10. Pile the mashed potato mixture into the reserved shells.
11. Return to the shallow baking dish and micro-cook, uncovered, on 100% power for 2 to 3 minutes, or until heated through.
12. Sprinkle with paprika, if desired.
